---
name: "Step 09 - Strategic Summary"
description: "Demo Step 9: Write a 5-point executive summary with recommended actions, each citing the figure that supports it and tracing back to source data."
agent: agent
model: "Claude Sonnet 4.5 (copilot)"
---

Based on everything analyzed in Steps 1-6, write a 5-point executive
summary with recommended actions. Each point should cite the figure
that supports it and tie back to the source data.

> Rule: This is a draft for human review -- not a final deliverable. Do not present it as ready to send.
> Rule: Every figure cited must be traceable to a source file, column, and row range.
> Rule: Do not invent findings not supported by the data already analyzed.
